name: search_knowledge_base
description: Search across all content in basic-memory

arguments.name: timeframe
arguments.description:
How far back to search (e.g. '1d', '1 week')

Provide as a JSON string matching the following schema: {"anyOf":[{"type":"string"},{"type":"null"}],"description":"How far back to search (e.g. '1d', '1 week')"}
